pump_calibration.title: Pump calibration
pump_calibration.description: Set the pump flow used to calculate total water from dosing seconds.

planter_set.title: Add or update planter
planter_set.description: Send a planter configuration to the Watering.IO Hub.

planter_delete.title: Delete planter
planter_delete.description: Delete one planter configuration from the Watering.IO Hub.

refresh_planters.title: Refresh planter list
refresh_planters.description: A planter list refresh was requested from the hub. The integration currently has {planter_count} planter configuration(s) cached.

error.integration_not_loaded: The Watering.IO integration is not loaded.
